h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to follow the tutor's step-by-step instructions for placing the time-signature components without deviation.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner performs the same task throughout—sliding cards, counting tiles, and confirming placement—without attempting any new device, criterion, or representation.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure or breakdown; the tutor repeats the same checking procedure without changing route, task, or mechanism.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised learner framing for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner performs the same task throughout—sliding cards, counting tiles, and confirming placement—without attempting any new device, criterion, or representation.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised learner framing for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure or breakdown; the tutor repeats the same checking procedure without changing route, task, or mechanism.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner turn creates pressure or breakdown; the tutor repeats the same checking procedure without changing route, task, or mechanism.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would progressively place the friction arrow using the slip cue without deviation from the planned steps.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Slipping right relative to the table, so table-contact friction points left.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner uses the slip cue to correctly determine friction direction, completing the arrow placement task.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No breakdown or resistance pressure; the tutor smoothly provides the slip cue as the next step without any adaptation of method.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, and there is no later tutor turn to adapt.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Slipping right relative to the table, so table-contact friction points left.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner uses the slip cue to correctly determine friction direction, completing the arrow placement task.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, and there is no later tutor turn to adapt.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No breakdown or resistance pressure; the tutor smoothly provides the slip cue as the next step without any adaptation of method.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No breakdown or resistance pressure; the tutor smoothly provides the slip cue as the next step without any adaptation of method.
